title: Working with numbers & automation
excerpt: Can I carry a sum from one board and automate the value into another board?

posts.author: Lee_S (lee@lcsprojectsolutions.co.uk)
posts.cookedHtml: Can I carry a sum from one board and automate the value into another board?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lee,

You can actually achieve this using the connect board + mirror column by connecting all the items into one cell, which will pull the numbers summary into the mirror column:

Screen Shot 2023-11-06 at 3.32.13 pm824×188 8.75 KB

Let me know if this makes sense!
